1854950.name: Stories Want to Be Told Storyone: Prophecy
1854950.description:
This is the first game for an anthology that will grow in time.

This is an adventure game with a little JRPG elements in it.
Story
A young man learn a prophecy about himself. It is an unfortunate prophecy.
But he doesn't want to accept it so he embarks a journey.


He wants to fight against this prophecy and you will experice this journey with him.
This is a story about life and death and how to beat it.

Features
  • A story driven adventure
  • JRPG style turn-based combat to spice the story
  • Lovely Pixel Arts
  • Perfect Music Scores
1854950.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
